title: The Loves of Hercules
writer: Sandro Continenza, Luciano Doria, Alberto Manca
actors: Jayne Mansfield, Mickey Hargitay, Massimo Serato
plot: Hercules decides to avenge the death of his wife, murdered at the hands of Éurito, king of Ecalia, but everything is a plot of an ambitious courtier. Hercules ends up falling in love with Deyanira, who is now a good queen.
